name: Discovery Call
description: Quick intro chat to understand your goals and see if we're a fit.
cancellationRule: Free reschedule up to 12h before. Free cancellation up to 2h before.

name: Strategy Deep Dive
description: Focused 90-minute working session on a specific decision or initiative.
cancellationRule: Refundable up to 24h before. After that 50% refund.

name: Decision Sprint
description: Hands-on 60-minute working block to unblock a single strategic call.
location: Zoom or Berlin office · your choice

name: Founder Workshop
description: Small-group strategy workshop for early-stage founder teams.
cancellationRule: Reschedule up to 5 days before. No refunds within 48h.

name: Morning Yoga
description: 45-minute mindful flow open to all levels. Mats provided.
